subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Analyze the story critically and deeply
Interpret themes such as courage, perseverance, and teamwork
Examine character motivations and decisions under stress
Develop analytical, descriptive, and creative writing skills
Understand cause-effect relationships and sequence of events

lesson_plan.title: Introduction and Predictive Reading
teaching_strategy: Prediction exercises using title and illustrations

lesson_plan.title: Character Analysis and Motivation
student_activities: Explain how decisions affected the journey outcome

lesson_plan.title: Event Sequencing and Cause-Effect
student_activities: Create a cause-effect diagram of key events
Explain how actions led to outcomes

lesson_plan.title: Critical Thinking and Problem Solving
student_activities: Role-play a critical situation from the story
Propose alternative solutions and justify them

lesson_plan.title: Descriptive and Creative Writing
student_activities: Write descriptive passages about climbing challenges
Create an alternate ending for the story

lesson_plan.title: Reflection and Analysis
topics_covered: Themes and morals of the story
Personal reflections on teamwork and perseverance
student_activities: Write a paragraph analyzing theme or moral
Present personal reflections and lessons learned

teacher_tip: Encourage students to critically analyze the story, focusing on teamwork, problem-solving, and perseverance, while practicing descriptive and creative writing.
